backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the chat application backend with types and state for chatrooms, messages, reactions, user profiles, pinned videos (per-user keyed by chatroomId+userId), access control, and blob storage mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old chatroom schema (which included a pinnedVideoId field) to the new schema (without it) by mapping over the chatrooms OrderedMap.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two implemented features: admin message deletion (with backend delete-by-id and admin UI button) and per-user pinned video storage keyed by (chatroomId, userId).
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-generated text file containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing component responsibilities and key implementation details.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point with cache-busting meta tags, a root div, and a versioned module script tag loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that sets up TanStack Router with lobby, chatroom, and admin routes, and conditionally hides the Header and Footer on admin and chatroom pages.
frontend/src/components/AvatarPickerDial: Dialog component allowing users to upload an image, select a GIF from Giphy (with debounced search and trending fallback), or remove their current avatar.
frontend/src/components/ChatArea.tsx: Main chat area component that displays messages, handles sending/replying, auto-scrolls, and shows a pinned video for a given chatroom. Filters out media-less Creator messages and supports scrolling to a target message with highlight.
frontend/src/components/ChatroomCard.tsx: Card component for displaying a chatroom in the lobby, showing its thumbnail (YouTube, Twitch, Twitter, or default), topic, stats, and metadata. Fetches Twitch thumbnails and Twitter oEmbed previews dynamically.
frontend/src/components/CreateChatroomDi: Dialog form for creating a new chatroom with fields for topic, description, category, and media (file upload, YouTube/Twitch video URL, or Twitter post). Handles validation, upload progress, and tweet preview rendering.
frontend/src/components/ExternalLinkDisc: Modal dialog that warns users they are leaving the app when clicking an external link, displaying the target URL and requiring confirmation before proceeding.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying a copyright notice and a link to caffeine.ai with a heart icon.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: App header with the Chattr logo, an inline username editor with alphanumeric validation, an avatar picker trigger, and a back-to-lobby button shown when inside a chatroom.
frontend/src/components/LoginPrompt.tsx: No-op placeholder component that renders nothing; authentication is intentionally not used in this anonymous app.
frontend/src/components/MessageBubble.ts: Renders an individual chat message bubble with support for media (YouTube, Twitch, Twitter, images, voice), emoji reactions, reply, pin/unpin video, report, and external link disclaimer. Handles URL detection and Twitter widget embedding.
frontend/src/components/MessageInput.tsx: A rich message input component supporting text, image upload, voice recording, GIF search via Giphy, and auto-detection of YouTube/Twitch/Twitter URLs in message text.
frontend/src/components/PinnedVideo.tsx: Displays a pinned YouTube or Twitch video embed in a chatroom with an unpin button that calls the unpinVideo mutation.
frontend/src/components/VoiceMessagePlay: An audio player component for voice messages featuring a waveform visualization, play/pause toggle, seek slider, and time display.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useDebouncedValue.ts: A generic hook that returns a debounced version of the provided value, delaying updates by a configurable delay (default 300ms).
frontend/src/hooks/useForceFreshChatroom: A hook that purges stale or empty cached chatroom data and forces a fresh refetch of the chatrooms list once the ICP actor becomes ready, exposing a recovery-in-progress flag.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks and utilities for chatroom queries, mutations, image uploads, and user identity (username/avatar) management via localStorage.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind, defines light/dark theme CSS variables using OKLCH color space, and includes custom styles for mobile inputs and voice message range sliders.
frontend/src/lib/config.ts: Exports frontend configuration constants including the Giphy API key and result limit.
frontend/src/lib/formatters.ts: Exports a utility function to format numbers into compact human-readable strings (e.g., 1200 → '1.2k').
frontend/src/lib/giphy.ts: Provides functions to search Giphy and fetch trending GIFs via the Giphy API, returning normalized GIF objects.
frontend/src/lib/html2canvasLoader.ts: Empty file, likely a placeholder for a lazy html2canvas loader module.
frontend/src/lib/imageCompression.ts: Client-side image compression utility that resizes and recompresses image files using a canvas, with progress callbacks and fallback to the original file.
frontend/src/lib/twitterEmbedRenderer.ts: Empty file, likely a placeholder for a Twitter embed rendering module.
frontend/src/lib/twitterOEmbedPreview.ts: Fetches Twitter oEmbed JSON to extract safe preview fields (author, text, image) with in-flight deduplication and localStorage caching.
frontend/src/lib/twitterOEmbedPreviewCac: Manages localStorage caching of Twitter oEmbed preview objects with versioning and a 7-day expiration policy.
frontend/src/lib/twitterThumbnail.ts: Empty file, likely a placeholder for a Twitter thumbnail fetching module.
frontend/src/lib/twitterThumbnailCache.t: Empty file, likely a placeholder for a Twitter thumbnail cache module.
frontend/src/lib/videoUtils.ts: Utility functions for extracting video/channel IDs from YouTube, Twitch, and Twitter/X URLs, and generating thumbnail and embed URLs for each platform.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDeleteChatroomsP: Password-protected admin page that lists all chatrooms and flagged messages, allowing admins to delete individual messages or entire chatrooms.
frontend/src/pages/ChatroomPage.tsx: Page component that loads a specific chatroom by ID, increments its view count on load, and renders the ChatArea with optional deep-link target message support.
frontend/src/pages/LobbyPage.tsx: Lobby page displaying all chatrooms with client-side search, category filtering, and algorithmic sorting (live rooms first, then by presence and recency), plus a create chatroom dialog.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, box shadow, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file recording existing features, pending architectural requests, and notes for the Chattr app, including per-user pinned videos and admin message deletion tasks.
